ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "role" TEXT /* Player's role (e.g., Batsman, Bowler, All-rounder) */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Player's batting style (e.g., Right-hand, Left-hand) */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Player's bowling style (e.g., Right-arm fast, Left-arm spin) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match is played */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team playing */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team playing */,
  "toss_winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the toss */,
  "toss_decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the toss winner (e.g., Bat, Field) */,
  "umpire1" TEXT /* Name of the first umpire */,
  "umpire2" TEXT /* Name of the second umpire */,
  "man_of_the_match" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was the man of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose performance is recorded */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match in which the performance occurred */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the player */,
  "balls" INTEGER /* Balls faced by the player */,
  "fours" INTEGER /* Number of fours hit by the player */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Number of sixes hit by the player */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the player */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken by the player */,
  "overs" REAL /* Number of overs bowled by the player */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate of the player */,
  "dismissal_type" TEXT /* Type of dismissal (e.g., Caught, Bowled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of venue (e.g., Stadium, Ground) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match result */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "winning_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "margin" TEXT /* Margin by which the match was won */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of determining the result (e.g., Normal, DLS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_winning_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("winning_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach manages */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the coach joined the team */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Coach's nationality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored at the venue */,
  "total_balls" INTEGER /* Total balls faced at the venue */,
  "total_fours" INTEGER /* Total fours hit at the venue */,
  "total_sixes" INTEGER /* Total sixes hit at the venue */,
  "total_wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken at the venue */,
  "total_overs" REAL /* Total overs bowled at the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venues_performance_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venues_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's statistics record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total matches played by the player */,
  "average_runs" REAL /* Average runs scored per match */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Overall strike rate of the player */,
  "total_wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken by the player */,
  "total_overs" REAL /* Total overs bowled by the player */,
  "total_catches" INTEGER /* Total catches taken by the player */,
  "total_stumpings" INTEGER /* Total stumpings by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match analyzed */,
  "insight" TEXT /* Insight or comment regarding the player's performance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis was created */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who created the insight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach providing feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the player's performance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was created */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the coach (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
